plan_kts:
fun plan(repoPath: String, owner: String, repo: String, pullNumber: Int): Result {
    val contextReadme = readFile(".repo_context/README.md")
    val contextIndex = readFile(".repo_context/index.md")
    val maintenance = readFile(".repo_context/maintenance.md")
    val repoIndex = readFile(".repo_context/generated/repo_index.md")
    val engineeringPrinciples = readFile(".repo_context/modules/overview/engineering-principles.md")
    val selfVerificationPlaybook = readFile(".repo_context/playbooks/upkeep/ai-self-verification.md")
    val pullRequest = githubPullRequestRead(owner = owner, repo = repo, pullNumber = pullNumber, method = "get")
    val pullRequestFiles = githubPullRequestRead(owner = owner, repo = repo, pullNumber = pullNumber, method = "get_files")
    val pullRequestDiff = githubPullRequestRead(owner = owner, repo = repo, pullNumber = pullNumber, method = "get_diff")
    val pullRequestComments = githubPullRequestRead(owner = owner, repo = repo, pullNumber = pullNumber, method = "get_comments")
    val reviewThreads = githubPullRequestRead(owner = owner, repo = repo, pullNumber = pullNumber, method = "get_review_comments")
    val linkedIssueRefs = extractLinkedIssueRefs(pullRequest, pullRequestComments)
    val linkedIssues = githubIssueReadMany(owner = owner, repo = repo, issueRefs = linkedIssueRefs, method = "get")
    val changedDomains = mapChangedFilesToRepoContext(repoIndex, pullRequestFiles)
    val domainContext = readRelevantRepoContext(repoPath, changedDomains)
    val sourceSnippets = readChangedSourceFiles(repoPath, pullRequestFiles)
    val statedSpec = synthesizeSpecFromIssueAndPr(linkedIssues, pullRequest, pullRequestComments, domainContext)
    val statedPlan = synthesizeImplementationPlanFromPr(pullRequest, pullRequestFiles, pullRequestDiff, domainContext)
    val implementedBehavior = synthesizeImplementedBehavior(pullRequestDiff, sourceSnippets, engineeringPrinciples)
    val specSolvesIssue = planSubagentCheck(name = "spec-solves-issue", issue = linkedIssues, spec = statedSpec, context = domainContext)
    val planImplementsSpec = planSubagentCheck(name = "plan-implements-spec", spec = statedSpec, plan = statedPlan, context = domainContext)
    val codeImplementsPlan = planSubagentCheck(name = "code-implements-plan", plan = statedPlan, code = implementedBehavior, diff = pullRequestDiff, context = domainContext)
    val hotPathAssessment = assessHotPathConcerns(pullRequestFiles, pullRequestDiff, engineeringPrinciples)
    val statefulAssessment = assessStatefulConcerns(pullRequestFiles, pullRequestDiff, engineeringPrinciples)
    val sharedStateAssessment = assessSharedStateConcerns(pullRequestFiles, pullRequestDiff, engineeringPrinciples)
    val combinedVerdict = combineAdherenceVerdicts(specSolvesIssue, planImplementsSpec, codeImplementsPlan, hotPathAssessment, statefulAssessment, sharedStateAssessment)
    val verifiedVerdict = applySelfVerification(combinedVerdict, selfVerificationPlaybook)
    return makeResult(verifiedVerdict)
}
